name: Portable-Kit Prompt Compiler
description: Meta-skill that briefs external LLMs on writing prompts for Claude Code running in portable-kit. Outputs a copy-pasteable template + rubric the external LLM fills in. Compiled prompts activate correct skills, run parallel where independent, verify themselves via showcase-presenter, and produce reusable artifacts.

tools: Claude Code or compatible AI client

estimated_time: 2 minutes to hand off, varies for the compile
